Workbook: Request-grounded spreadsheet

Sheet: Overview
Metric,Q1,Q2,Q3,Q4,Annual Total
totals, conditional formatting for overages, and a summary chart,72,76,81,84,=SUM(B2:E2)

Metric,Formula,Value
Top trend,=MAX(Overview!B2:E4),calculated in workbook
Lowest trend,=MIN(Overview!B2:E4),calculated in workbook
Average,=AVERAGE(Overview!B2:E4),calculated in workbook

Conditional Formatting
- Highlight the strongest quarterly value in green.
- Highlight the weakest quarterly value in red.

Summary Chart
- Multi-series chart comparing the three tracked metrics across quarters.
